producer: string - Name of the script/application that generated the report
timestamp: ISO8601 date-time - Application execution completion time
message: string - Human-readable message about the execution result

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced by the application. Keys correspond to names declared in the 'produces' section.

invoices: list of invoice codes or objects

metrics.description: Additional execution metrics (optional). Keys are metric names, values are numeric or string.
